title: Your Name · Personal site
heroTitle: Turn your ideas into a clearer personal site
heroText: This starter is built for people who want a personal site, portfolio, booking page, and writing space without editing lots of code.

cards.title: Introduce yourself clearly
cards.text: Explain who you are, what you care about, and what kind of conversations or work you want to attract.

cards.title: Show selected work
cards.text: Present case studies, achievements, or writing in a structure that is easy to scan and easy to maintain.

cards.title: Let people take action
cards.text: Send visitors to contact, booking, consulting, or recruiter-friendly summary pages with clear next steps.
